title: 菊花賞の後に・大きな変化

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Aaaaand the winner of the Kikuka Sho is...
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Mission... complete!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Awesome run, Bourbon! You made the Classics
absolutely unforgettable this year!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
You were fantastic in every single race of the
Classic Triple Crown! Thank you for all your hard
work!

Mihono Bourbon looks baffled by these kind
words.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: But I...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I was unable to obtain the Triple Crown.

She usually puts the opinions of others before her
own, but she must be truly perplexed, as she
remains obstinate.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Next time?

Our goal wasn't just to win the Triple Crown, but
also to make Mihono Bourbon a runner who
inspires courage in others.
choice_data_list: Let's tackle the spring Tenno Sho next.

text_block_list.text:
I'm positive she can get through that
3,200-meter long-distance G1 race in her current
condition.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I do not have confidence in my ability to inspire
courage in people...

I push her to remember how the audience reacted
after the race.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Replaying data log...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I do not know if they were filled with "courage,"
but I detected cheering, encouraging words, and
many positive emotions.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
As expected, I am unable to comprehend. I failed
to fulfill the dream I declared, so why did they
react so positively?
choice_data_list: Because you look powerful when you run.
Because you look powerful when you run.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I believe I am experiencing the phenomenon
known as "déjà vu."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I... failed...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Awesome run, Bourbon! You were so cool out
there!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Thank you for all your hard work!

Mihono Bourbon looks baffled by these kind
words.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: But I...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I wanted to win.

She usually puts the opinions of others before her
own, but she must be truly perplexed, as she
remains obstinate.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Next time?

Our goal wasn't just to win the Triple Crown, but
also to make Mihono Bourbon a runner who
inspires courage in others.
choice_data_list: Let's tackle the spring Tenno Sho next.

text_block_list.text:
I'm positive she can get through that
3,200-meter long-distance G1 race in her current
condition.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I do not have confidence in my ability to inspire
courage in people...

I push her to remember how the audience reacted
after the race.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Replaying data log... There were some negative
emotions, but I also detected cheering,
encouraging words, and many positive emotions.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I am unable to comprehend their reactions. I did
not win, so why did they react so positively?
choice_data_list: Because you look powerful when you run.
Because you look powerful when you run.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I believe I am experiencing the phenomenon
known as "déjà vu."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I sense your strong "will," Trainer, just as I did at
summer camp. However—
choice_data_list: Let's keep doing our best, together!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The truth is that I cannot determine whether or
not I can really "inspire courage" in others.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, if that is an order, then I will see it
through. Second order acknowledged.
And so we set our sights on the spring Tenno Sho.

Just as we arrive at the academy, Mihono
Bourbon comes to a sudden standstill.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: An unknown error has occurred...

Looking confused, she holds a hand to her chest
and closes her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We're coming up on the fourth corner of the
Kikuka Sho, and Rice Shower is pulling toward the
front!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
(Her speed, her intensity, her gaze, her
breathing—is this Rice's "spirit"?)

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
(...Why am I so interested in Rice in the middle of
a race?)

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: YAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Footage from the Kikuka Sho is automatically
replaying in my mind. I can vividly see Rice
running.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Accompanying this imagery, I detect an
"unsettled" feeling deep in my chest. What is it?

I'm relieved that she's not in some kind of
physical pain. Still, I'm not sure what is causing
her discomfort.

It's possible she's feeling the weight of Rice
Shower's drive and it's causing her anxiety.

Suddenly, a group of shrill-voiced high school
girls walk by.

text_block_list.name: High School Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Did you see?! Mihono Bourbon came sooooo
close to winning this year's Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: High School Girl B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I saw! It sucks that she didn't quite get it,
but she was super amazing!

text_block_list.name: High School Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, who do you think would win in a race
between Mihono Bourbon and Tokai Teio?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Tokai... Teio...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Recurrence of "unsettled" feeling confirmed.
choice_data_list: Is it possible you're worried about Teio?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I don't know...
She holds her chest with a perplexed expression.
choice_data_list:
(It's unusual for her to be so concerned about
other runners...)

text_block_list.text:
The two of them have been compared time and
time again, but she's never once paid any mind to
Tokai Teio.

And it's not just Tokai Teio—she has the same
sensation in her chest when she thinks about Rice
Shower.

Perhaps this is the true nature of the "unsettled"
feeling she's been having since the Kikuka Sho.
Maybe she's changing more than I realized.

I just hope it doesn't negatively impact her
performance in the spring Tenno Sho...
